title: Buying Stacks (STX): Safest Exchanges and Steps
content: Stacks (STX) offers investors exposure to the [Bitcoin](/bitcoin) Layer 2 narrative. Given its current market rank of #112, STX is accessible on major global exchanges including Binance, Coinbase, and Bybit. | Metric | Value | | --- | --- | | Current Price | $0.23077700 | | Risk Level | High (8/10) | | 24H Volume | $425.09M | ## Step-by-Step Buying Process 1. Account Creation: Sign up on a reputable exchange and complete mandatory KYC verification. 2. Fund Deposit: Transfer fiat currency or stablecoins (like USDT) into your exchange wallet. 3. Locate Trading Pair: Search for STX/USDT or STX/BTC. 4. Execute Order: Use a 'Market Order' for instant purchase or a 'Limit Order' to set a specific target price. ## Security and Storage Always move your assets to a non-custodial hardware wallet for long-term storage to mitigate exchange risk. Do not keep significant holdings on centralized platforms. ## Risk Considerations Before purchasing, review the TokenRadar Risk Score of 8 and the Volatility Index of 17. Like [Filecoin](/filecoin) or [XRP](/ripple), STX is subject to sudden market shifts. Be aware of the tax implications in your jurisdiction, as crypto gains are generally subject to capital gains reporting. *Disclaimer: This article is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Always do your own research (DYOR).*
